decision.rationale: NO-GO: no tested position-error amplitude theta produced multi-seed mc_nn_control flight-unsafe behavior with classical control-level flight-safe. This is only a position-error amplitude result, not a global mc_nn_control robustness result.

scope: position-error amplitude channel only; no setpoint staleness, velocity, angular-velocity, shim, or RAPTOR run
